'''âl-y-v''' ('''kalayav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isoattenuate|isoattenuate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isoattenuate|isoattenuate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-y-v
|-
! Lemma
| kalayav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilayav|thilayav]] || [[word:jilayav|jilayav]] || [[word:shilayav|shilayav]] || [[word:kilayav|kilayav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulayav|thuthulayav]] || [[word:jujulayav|jujulayav]] || [[word:shushulayav|shushulayav]] || [[word:kukulayav|kukulayav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulayav|thulayav]] || [[word:julayav|julayav]] || [[word:shulayav|shulayav]] || [[word:kulayav|kulayav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulayav|thulayav]] || [[word:julayav|julayav]] || [[word:shulayav|shulayav]] || [[word:kulayav|kulayav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelayav|thelayav]] || [[word:jelayav|jelayav]] || [[word:shelayav|shelayav]] || [[word:kelayav|kelayav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholayav|thotholayav]] || [[word:jojolayav|jojolayav]] || [[word:shosholayav|shosholayav]] || [[word:kokolayav|kokolayav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholayav|tholayav]] || [[word:jolayav|jolayav]] || [[word:sholayav|sholayav]] || [[word:kolayav|kolayav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholayav|tholayav]] || [[word:jolayav|jolayav]] || [[word:sholayav|sholayav]] || [[word:kolayav|kolayav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlayav|thĂŠlayav]] || [[word:jĂŠlayav|jĂŠlayav]] || [[word:shĂŠlayav|shĂŠlayav]] || [[word:kĂŠlayav|kĂŠlayav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalayav|thathalayav]] || [[word:jajalayav|jajalayav]] || [[word:shashalayav|shashalayav]] || [[word:kakalayav|kakalayav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalayav|thalayav]] || [[word:jalayav|jalayav]] || [[word:shalayav|shalayav]] || [[word:kalayav|kalayav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalayav|thalayav]] || [[word:jalayav|jalayav]] || [[word:shalayav|shalayav]] || [[word:kalayav|kalayav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalayav|shalayav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalayav|goshalayav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalayav|gokishalayav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalayavnĂŒ|shalayavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalayavnknĂŒ|goshalayavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalayavnĂŒ|gokishalayavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalayavshĂ«|shalayavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalayavnkshĂ«|goshalayavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalayavshĂ«|gokishalayavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalayavro|shalayavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalayavnkro|goshalayavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalayavro|gokishalayavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalayavmu|shalayavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalayavnkmu|goshalayavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalayavmu|gokishalayavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalayavsher|shalayavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalayavnksher|goshalayavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalayavsher|gokishalayavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalayavng|shalayavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalayavnkng|goshalayavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalayavng|gokishalayavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalayavya|shalayavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalayavnkya|goshalayavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalayavya|gokishalayavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalayavyam|shalayavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalayavnkyam|goshalayavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalayavyam|gokishalayavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalayavnĂŒshĂ«|shalayavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalayavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalayavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalayavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalayavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalayavnĂŒro|shalayavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalayavnknĂŒro|goshalayavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalayavnĂŒro|gokishalayavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalayavnĂŒmu|shalayavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalayavnknĂŒmu|goshalayavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalayavnĂŒmu|gokishalayavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalayavshĂ«nĂŒ|shalayavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalayavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalayavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalayavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalayavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalayavshĂ«ro|shalayavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalayavnkshĂ«ro|goshalayavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalayavshĂ«ro|gokishalayavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalayavshĂ«mu|shalayavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalayavnkshĂ«mu|goshalayavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalayavshĂ«mu|gokishalayavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalayavronĂŒ|shalayavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalayavnkronĂŒ|goshalayavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalayavronĂŒ|gokishalayavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalayavroshĂ«|shalayavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalayavnkroshĂ«|goshalayavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalayavroshĂ«|gokishalayavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalayavromu|shalayavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalayavnkromu|goshalayavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalayavromu|gokishalayavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalayavmunĂŒ|shalayavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalayavnkmunĂŒ|goshalayavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalayavmunĂŒ|gokishalayavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalayavmushĂ«|shalayavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalayavnkmushĂ«|goshalayavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalayavmushĂ«|gokishalayavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalayavmuro|shalayavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalayavnkmuro|goshalayavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalayavmuro|gokishalayavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
